# exasol_role_grant (Resource)

Grants a role to a user or another role. This is distinct from object and system privileges - it assigns role membership.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Grant role to user
resource "exasol_role_grant" "analyst_to_user" {
  role    = exasol_role.analyst.name
  grantee = exasol_user.analyst.name
}

# Grant role with ADMIN OPTION (grantee can grant this role to others)
resource "exasol_role_grant" "admin_grant" {
  role              = exasol_role.analyst.name
  grantee           = exasol_role.senior_analyst.name
  with_admin_option = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grantee` (String) User or role name receiving the role.
- `role` (String) Role name to grant.

### Optional

- `with_admin_option` (Boolean) Grant the role with ADMIN OPTION, allowing the grantee to grant this role to others.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform ID in format: ROLE|GRANTEE|ADMIN_OPTION

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Format: ROLE|GRANTEE|ADMIN_OPTION
terraform import exasol_role_grant.analyst_to_user 'ANALYST_ROLE|ANALYST_USER|false'
```
